common.action: 5 big sips. Count them out loud so everyone can hear.
Take a sip and give the person to your left a sincere compliment.
Waterfall: drink until the person to your right tells you to stop

rare.action: Take a shot and immediately chase it with a sip of your drink
Finish your drink and immediately crack a new one
Take a shot of the cheapest liquor in the room
Drink whatever the person to your left hands you. No questions.

legendary.action: Shooey. Pour your drink into your shoe and drink it. No exceptions.
Everyone in the room group-chugs for 10 seconds. You started this.

common.action: Pick two people: they each drink 2 sips
Pick someone: they drink for 10 seconds straight. You count.
Make someone take a pull from the handle. Your choice who.
Pick any two people: they clink and drink together. 3 sips each.

rare.action: Pick two people: they each finish their drink
Choose someone: they do a shot
Pick a player: they must finish their drink
Give 5 sips to anyone. Split them up however you want.

legendary.action: Take anyone's drink. Regardless of cost or quality. It's yours now.
Kingmaker. Pick any player: they immediately gain 20 points.
Make someone shotgun. Twice. No mercy.
